ddls:
CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "class_type" TEXT /* Type of the class (e.g., Online, In-person) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the course content */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the course */,
  "credits" INTEGER /* Number of credits for the course */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* Prerequisites for the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the course the assignment belongs to */,
  "assignment_name" TEXT /* Name of the assignment */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date for the assignment */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points possible for the assignment */,
  "submission_type" TEXT /* Type of submission required (e.g., individual, group) */,
  "grading_criteria" TEXT /* Criteria used to grade the assignment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assignments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "topics" (
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each topic */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the course the topic belongs to */,
  "topic_name" TEXT /* Name of the topic */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or resources related to the topic */,
  "topic_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the topic */,
  "learning_objectives" TEXT /* Learning objectives for the topic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("topic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_topics_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., student, instructor) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_enrollment" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user enrolled in the course */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the user is enrolled in */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date when the user enrolled in the course */,
  "drop_date" TEXT /* Date when the user dropped the course (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_enrollment_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_enrollment_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "announcements" (
  "announcement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each announcement */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the course the announcement belongs to */,
  "announcement_text" TEXT /* Text of the announcement */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the announcement was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("announcement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_announcements_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "discussion_forums" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each post */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the course the post belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the post */,
  "post_text" TEXT /* Text of the post */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the post was created */,
  "parent_post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent post (if it's a reply) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_discussion_forums_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_discussion_forums_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grades" (
  "grade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grade */,
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the assignment the grade belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the grade */,
  "grade" REAL /* Grade received by the user */,
  "grade_date" TEXT /* Date when the grade was given */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grades_assignment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assignment_id") REFERENCES assignments ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grades_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
